Article Title: 'Won't beat around the bush': Shreyas Iyer fumes after Punjab Kings' defeat to Delhi Capitals
Article Text:
Shreyas Iyer (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Watch Jamie Overton opens up on CSK comeback & bowling role Jamie Overton opens up on CSK comeback & bowling role

Poll Do you believe Punjab Kings will bounce back against Mumbai Indians? Yes, they will win No, they will struggle

NEW DELHI: A win over Delhi Capitals would have taken Punjab Kings to the top of the IPL 2026 points table. However, that was not to be as Punjab Kings slumped to their fourth consecutive defeat of the season, going down by three wickets to Delhi Capitals in Dharamsala.The frustration and disappointment were clearly visible on Punjab Kings captain Shreyas Iyer ’s face during the post-match presentation.Asked to bat first by Delhi Capitals, Priyansh Arya smashed six sixes during his whirlwind 33-ball 56 before DC pacers adjusted their lengths smartly to restrict Punjab Kings to 210/5.In reply, aggressive half-centuries from David Miller (51 off 28) and skipper Axar Patel (56 off 30) powered Delhi Capitals to 211/7 in 19 overs - the highest successful chase at the Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium."(Where it went wrong) I won't beat around the bush; I'll just say fielding and bowling again," Iyer said after the match."(If he thought 210 was a good score) Absolutely, I feel that it was 30 runs more on this wicket considering how the ball was seaming and there was variable bounce," he said."(On bowling Chahal) There was absolutely a thought in my mind, but the way ball was seaming and the way it was helping seamers, I think if we would have executed our line and length precisely, we could have been able to extract wickets, but unfortunately again, we didn't," Iyer added.Explaining the ideal bowling strategy on the Dharamsala pitch, the PBKS skipper said:"(On how to bowl here) Still into the surface. I always say that the hard length - short of a hard length - is the best ball, especially when a new batsman is coming in. It's not easy to hit because if you keep repeating those balls, at least one ball gives a chance of mis-hitting and you can get a wicket. We've been short of planning," Iyer said.The win helped Delhi Capitals move up to seventh place in the IPL 2026 standings. DC have now played 12 matches, winning five and losing seven, with 10 points and a net run rate of -0.993.Punjab Kings, despite the loss, remain fourth on the table with 13 points from 11 matches, having registered six wins and four defeats, while one match ended without a result. Their net run rate stands at +0.428.Punjab Kings will next take on Mumbai Indians on May 14.
Article Summary: Punjab Kings lose by three wickets to Delhi Capitals in IPL 2026. Delhi Capitals move up to seventh place in the standings. Punjab Kings remain fourth on the table with 13 points from 11 matches. They will next take on Mumbai Indians on May 14.

Article Title: Core group quite valuable for MI, can’t just keep changing: Head coach Mahela Jayawardene
Article Text:
Captain Hardik Pandya, left, and coach Mahela Jayawardene (PTI Photo/Kunal Patil)

Watch Vaibhav Sooryavanshi India debut: The calls are getting louder Vaibhav Sooryavanshi India debut: The calls are getting louder

RAIPUR: Mumbai Indians ’ playoff hopes came to an end after a narrow two-wicket defeat to Royal Challengers Bengaluru here on Sunday, marking the fourth time in the last six seasons — after 2021, 2022 and 2024 — that the five-time champions have failed to progress beyond the league stage. The loss, their eighth in 11 matches this season, left head coach Mahela Jayawardene disappointed as he admitted that MI had not done enough across the campaign.“It’s disappointing. We’ve had our opportunities. We were not good enough,” Jayawardene said at the post-match press conference. “We were not consistent enough with the ball, with the bat. That showed in the margins. We were probably two, three wins away from being in the same group of contenders to get into that playoff.”He also brushed aside suggestions that frequent changes had hurt the team’s momentum, pointing instead to injuries and niggles that forced the management’s hand. “I don’t think it was chopping and changing,” he said. “We had a lot of injuries, a lot of niggles, guys getting injured, not available. Those were mostly forced changes.”Asked if it was worthwhile to keep backing some underperforming senior players, Mahela said, “They’re also trying to do their best. The commitment, the effort that they’re putting in is unbelievable. With Ro ( Rohit Sharma ) getting injured and coming back and batting the way he batted, it sums up.The core group is quite valuable for us. You can’t just keep changing. We went with the trust, the confidence that we had with them.”MI had RCB under pressure for long stretches and believed they could defend a target of 167 after Tilak Varma (57 off 42) and Naman Dhir (47 off 32) had lifted them to 166/7 despite Bhuvneshwar Kumar ’s 4/23. But Krunal Pandya ’s 73 off 46 balls kept RCB in contention.Reflecting on Krunal’s contribution, Jayawardene noted that he “used to play similar roles for us as well while he was in MI,” and highlighted the experience Krunal brings to an IPL game. He described Krunal’s performance as the defining innings in the chase, especially for maintaining a strong tempo throughout.MI were left to defend with limited options at the death and Jayawardene explained that the side had run out of experienced bowling resources. Even so, he felt the team was in the contest until the end. “All our experienced bowlers had bowled their quota at that time. We didn’t have anyone left,” he said. “I was pleased with the way we fought. It was a game of margins, probably should have executed a bit better at the end.”He added that captain Hardik Pandya was unavailable because of a “back issue” and remains under medical observation.
Article Summary: Mumbai Indians' playoff hopes came to an end after a narrow two-wicket defeat to Royal Challengers Bengaluru here on Sunday. It is the fourth time in the last six seasons that the five-time champions have failed to progress beyond the league stage.

Article Title: Srh Vs Gt: IPL 2026: SRH take on GT with eye on playoffs
Article Text:
GT look to move forward (ANI Photo)

Watch Vaibhav Sooryavanshi India debut: The calls are getting louder Vaibhav Sooryavanshi India debut: The calls are getting louder

AHMEDABAD: A high-stakes clash of contrasting T20 philosophies — one built on sustained aggression, the other on a more measured, methodical approach — is in the offing when Gujarat Titans host Sunrisers Hyderabad at the Narendra Modi Stadium here on Tuesday.GT, riding a four-match winning streak, will look to strengthen their position in the playoff race as the tournament enters the business end. SRH, also on 14 points like the Titans, arrive with momentum from their 33-run win over Punjab Kings.The Titans produced a near-complete performance against Rajasthan Royals, with Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan setting up the innings before Washington Sundar and Rahul Tewatia added the finishing touches. Although Vaibhav Sooryavanshi gave the Royals a fast start in the chase, Gujarat’s experienced bowling group — led by Rashid Khan , Kagiso Rabada and Jason Holder — took control to seal a 77-run win.SRH, too, are coming off a strong all-round display. Against PBKS, their top order again set the tone, with Travis Head , Abhishek Sharma, Ishan Kishan and Heinrich Klaasen all contributing to a total of 235/4 before Pat Cummins and the bowling unit closed out the game.How GT’s new-ball pair of Siraj and Rabada operate against Head and Abhishek could decide the direction of the contest. If SRH survive that early burst, they have Kishan, Klaasen and Nitish Kumar Reddy to carry the pressure into the middle and death overs.That makes Gujarat’s post-Powerplay options — Rashid, Holder, Washington and Sai Kishore — central to the tactical battle.GT’s top order has also tweaked its approach. Gill, instead of taking time to settle, has looked to score from ball one, helping the Titans lift the Powerplay scoring rate. The middle order, which had been under scrutiny earlier in the season, has also started making timely contributions, with Washington and Tewatia playing important cameos in the win over the Royals.
Article Summary: Gujarat Titans host Sunrisers Hyderabad at Narendra Modi Stadium on Tuesday. GT are on a four-match winning streak, while SRH are also on 14 points. Titans produced a near-complete performance against Rajasthan Royals.

Article Title: 'Kuldeep Yadav not in form is a problem': Irfan Pathan flags concern for Delhi Capitals
Article Text:
Kuldeep Yadav (Image: X)

Watch Mahela Jayawardene reflects on MI’s disappointing IPL 2026 campaign Mahela Jayawardene reflects on MI’s disappointing IPL 2026 campaign

Delhi Outclassed Punjab



Despite Delhi Capitals securing a win over Punjab Kings in IPL 2026, concerns continue to grow around the form of star spinner Kuldeep Yadav , who was left out of the playing XI. Former India cricketer Irfan Pathan highlighted Kuldeep’s struggles as a major issue for the franchise this season.Kuldeep’s IPL 2026 campaign has been far from convincing so far. The left-arm wrist-spinner has managed only seven wickets in nine matches while leaking runs at an economy rate of 10.4, the worst economy rate of his IPL career, surpassing his previous highest of 8.7 recorded in 2019 and 2024. He has also gone wicketless in five outings this season.The spinner has conceded under 10 runs per over in only two matches, against Lucknow Super Giants and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, while crossing that mark in the remaining seven games. Speaking about the issue, Pathan expressed concern over Delhi’s dependence on Kuldeep, especially on pitches offering assistance to spinners.“Kuldeep Yadav not being in form is a big problem for Delhi because the team depends heavily on him. Especially on a turning track, where there was some help from the pitch, if you still end up conceding runs and fail to pick wickets, then it becomes a serious concern,” Pathan said to IANS.The former all-rounder, however, backed Kuldeep’s quality and stressed that expectations are naturally higher from a frontline spinner. “There’s no doubt that he is a very good bowler. But when your main spinner is going at over 10 runs per over, any team would expect much better performances. These are the areas where Delhi could have done better, and perhaps the team would have seen improved results if things had gone according to their potential,” he added.Delhi Capitals pulled off one of the most thrilling chases of IPL 2026, defeating Punjab Kings by three wickets in Dharamshala after hunting down 211 with an over to spare. Punjab appeared firmly in control for most of the game, reducing DC to 33/3 and later 74/4 on a challenging surface.However, Axar Patel shifted the momentum with a blistering 56 off 30 balls, while David Miller produced another trademark finishing act with 51 off 28 deliveries. Ashutosh Sharma added a quickfire 24 off 10 balls before young all-rounder Madhav Tiwari made a crucial impact with both bat and ball, claiming 2/40 earlier and later smashing an unbeaten 18 off eight balls in the chase.Auqib Nabi sealed the dramatic win with a four and a six in his unbeaten 10 off just two deliveries as DC completed a remarkable comeback.Earlier, Punjab Kings got off to a flying start through Priyansh Arya and Prabhsimran Singh, racing to 51/0 in just three overs. Priyansh led the charge with a fearless 56 off 33 balls, including six sixes, putting Delhi’s bowlers under immense pressure. Despite Punjab’s explosive batting display, Delhi Capitals held their nerve in the chase to snatch victory from a dominant Punjab side.
Article Summary: Delhi Capitals beat Punjab Kings by three wickets in IPL 2026. Captain Mahela Jayawardene was left out of the playing XI. Irfan Pathan said Delhi's dependence on Kuldeep Yadav is a major issue.

Article Title: Dc Vs Pbks: Yesterday IPL Match Result: Delhi Capitals hunt down 211-run target vs Punjab Kings, keep hopes alive
Article Text:
PBKS vs DC (BCCI Photo)

Watch Krunal Pandya opens up on match-winning knock and RCB’s playoffs push Krunal Pandya opens up on match-winning knock and RCB’s playoffs push

DHARAMSHALA: For 15 overs, Punjab Kings had the game exactly where they wanted it. Delhi Capitals were bruised at 33/3, shaken again at 74/4 and chasing 211 on a challenging Dharamshala surface seemed like a mountain too high to climb. The crowd sensed the kill. Punjab’s quicks sensed collapse, and the match seemed to be moving only in one direction. Then Delhi started stealing overs. Not the loud, frantic kind of theft T20 cricket often produces, but the calculated kind. One boundary here, one over flipped there, one partnership dragging their belief back from the dead.By the time Punjab realised, Axar Patel had already smashed open the door and David Miller had the chase in his “arc”. The DC lower order turned into their accomplice. What followed was one of the most audacious chases of IPL 2026, as DC emerged victorious by three wickets with an over to spare.Axar’s 56 off 30 balls changed the emotional temperature of the game. Punjab had reduced Delhi to survival mode but Axar dragged them back into the fight with pure force.Miller then did what Miller has done across T20 leagues for more than a decade. His 51 off 28 balls, studded with three fours and four sixes, gave Delhi the confidence and hope they desperately needed. But it was Delhi’s lower middle order that refused to cave in.Ashutosh Sharma arrived swinging, blasting 24 off just 10 balls with two fours and two sixes, before Madhav Tiwari delivered the perfect finishing subplot. Earlier in the evening, the young allrounder had picked up 2/40 to stop Punjab from reaching something even more intimidating. Then, under pressure that would test more young players, he struck an unbeaten 18 off eight balls that tilted the chase decisively Delhi’s way.And when Punjab still hoped for one final twist, Auqib Nabi ended it in two swings — a four and a six in his unbeaten 10 off two balls — sealing a three-wicket win.Earlier, on a Dharamshala surface that had just enough life to keep the seamers interested, Punjab Kings openers Priyansh Arya and Prabhsimran Singh decided the best form of negotiation was outright dismissal of risk. In the first three overs itself, the duo forced Delhi Capitals to abandon conventional plans, racing to 51 without loss and, in effect, setting the tone for everything that followed.Priyansh (56 off 33b; 2x4, 6x6) announced his intent with a pair of sixes that were less agricultural slog and more calculated in nature. Lungi Ngidi was treated similarly soon after. Two more sixes, another boundary and suddenly Delhi Capitals were reacting instead of planning at the HPCA Stadium on Monday evening.What stood out was not merely the aggression but the clarity. Priyansh, coming off two quiet outings, didn’t go into a shell despite the failures. There is something wonderfully uncomplicated about him at the moment. He sees length early, trusts his swing arc and does not overthink reputation. However, the knock wasn’t to come in a winning cause as Capitals stole the limelight.
Article Summary: Axar Patel's 56 off 30 balls changed the emotional temperature of the game. Priyansh Arya and Prabhsimran Singh decided the best form of negotiation was outright dismissal of risk. Auqib Nabi ended it in two swings — a four and a six in his unbeaten 10 off two balls — sealing a three-wicket win.

Article Title: ISL: Antonio Habas leaves Inter Kashi with immediate effect; assistant coach to step in
Article Text:
Antonio Habas. (ISL Photo)

New Delhi:

Watch ISL commercial rights: AIFF get two different bids ISL commercial rights: AIFF get two different bids

Antonio Habas has left Inter Kashi with immediate effect, TimesofIndia.com has learnt. The Spanish manager announced the decision on social media. He had been with the club for two seasons, leading them to the top tier.On Instagram, Habas wrote: ‘End of the chapter: Mission accomplished’ with the caption: "Trust is built through keeping commitments, and unfortunately, when those commitments are not fulfilled, trust is lost.”The club confirmed that the Spaniard had a contract until the end of the season but has decided to step away with two games remaining in the season. The assistant coach Abhijit will manage the promoted club against Mohun Bagan Super Giants on Tuesday.Habas had joined Inter Kashi in 2024 and guided the club to the I-League title the next season. It made him the only manager to win both the I-League and the Indian Super League (ISL) titles.The 68-year-old had made stinging remarks after their 0-3 loss vs Punjab FC last month. “Inter Kashi is in a very, very complicated situation with a lot of problems in the club … We need to talk about the situation of the players and staff with the owner of the club, because it’s impossible to compete in the ISL,” he had said.“I am very, very sad about this situation. We have been fighting since the last season 100 per cent, and now it’s possible that the players and staff will not receive their salaries. It’s impossible,” he had continued.A club official, however, had attributed these comments to the clubs' difficult legal position imposed by Churchill Brothers' legal challenges.Inter Kashi, currently 10th in the standings, will conclude their season against SC Delhi on May 17.
Article Summary: Antonio Habas has left Inter Kashi with immediate effect. The Spanish manager announced the decision on social media. He had been with the club for two seasons, leading them to the top tier. Assistant coach Abhijit will manage the promoted club against Mohun Bagan.

Article Title: 29th La Liga title! Marcus Rashford, Ferran Torres headline Barcelona's historic win over Real Madrid
Article Text:
Marcus Rashford of FC Barcelona celebrates (Photo by David Ramos/Getty Images)

Watch Exclusive: Aymeric Laporte previews Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona | La Liga Exclusive: Aymeric Laporte previews Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona | La Liga

Barcelona sealed their 29th La Liga title in style after beating rivals Real Madrid 2-0 in a huge Clasico clash on Sunday. The win confirmed back-to-back league titles for Hansi Flick’s side and also left Madrid without a single major trophy this season.Barca only needed to avoid defeat but came out attacking from the start at Camp Nou. Marcus Rashford, playing in place of injured youngster Lamine Yamal, opened the scoring with a brilliant free-kick.Ferran Torres quickly added a second after a smart assist from Dani Olmo, sending the home crowd into celebration mode.Real Madrid tried to respond but struggled to create enough clear chances. Jude Bellingham had a goal ruled out for offside, while Vinicius Junior was denied by Barcelona goalkeeper Joan Garcia. Madrid also came into the game surrounded by problems after reports of a training-ground scuffle involving Fede Valverde and Aurelien Tchouameni.Barcelona’s title win felt even more emotional because coach Hansi Flick was managing the game despite the recent death of his father. His side controlled the match comfortably and nearly scored more goals through Rashford, Raphinha and Robert Lewandowski.After the final whistle, midfielder Frenkie de Jong said the title felt extra special because it came against Madrid at home.“This title is more special for winning it at home against Madrid, now we have to enjoy it with the fans,” he said.De Jong also praised Barcelona’s performances this season while admitting the team still has bigger goals ahead.“We have been the best team in Spain -- of course we (also) want to win the Champions League, that's the objective. Next year we will have another opportunity,” the Dutchman added.Meanwhile, Madrid now face major questions about the future, with changes expected in the summer after another disappointing campaign.
Article Summary: Barcelona beat Real Madrid 2-0 in Clasico at Camp Nou. Marcus Rashford and Ferran Torres scored the goals. The win confirmed back-to-back league titles for Barcelona. Real Madrid are without a major trophy this season.

Article Title: Kylian Mbappé ruled out of El Clasico as Barcelona close in on La Liga title
Article Text:
Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappe (AP Photo)

Real Madrid will head into Sunday’s decisive Clasico against FC Barcelona without star forward Kylian Mbappé, dealing a massive setback to their already fading hopes of stopping their rivals from clinching another La Liga crown.Mbappé, who currently tops the league scoring charts with 24 goals, has failed to recover in time from the left hamstring injury that has ruled him out since the end of April. The France captain was left out of Madrid’s travelling squad, leaving the visitors without their biggest attacking weapon for one of the most important matches of the season.The absence comes at a difficult time for Mbappé, who recently responded to criticism surrounding his commitment to the club and his recovery process. Reports in Spain claimed sections of the Madrid fanbase feared the forward was being overly cautious ahead of the upcoming World Cup. Mbappé publicly dismissed those concerns and insisted he remained fully focused on returning for the club as quickly as possible.Barcelona now stand on the verge of sealing back-to-back Spanish league titles. The Catalan giants host their fiercest rivals at Camp Nou knowing that even a draw would be enough to mathematically secure the championship.Heading into the final Clasico of the campaign, Barcelona sit 11 points clear of Madrid with only four league games remaining.Madrid’s preparations for the high-pressure clash have also been overshadowed by a series of troubling incidents behind the scenes. Midfielders Federico Valverde and Aurélien Tchouaméni were both handed fines of 500,000 euros following a heated confrontation during training last week. The altercation reportedly ended with Valverde suffering a head injury after accidentally hitting a table.The drama did not end there. Defender Álvaro Carreras later admitted he had also been involved in a “minor” training-ground incident with a teammate. Spanish reports claimed Carreras and fellow defender Antonio Rüdiger were involved in a scuffle during practice.Amid the turmoil, Madrid manager Álvaro Arbeloa is facing mounting pressure. Arbeloa was promoted from the reserve setup after Xabi Alonso was dismissed in January, but the club now appears set to finish a second straight season without a major trophy.Spanish media reports have also linked club president Florentino Pérez with a sensational move to bring back José Mourinho in an effort to revive the struggling side and restore discipline within the squad.
Article Summary: Kylian Mbappé has failed to recover in time from a hamstring injury. The France captain was left out of Real Madrid's travelling squad. Barcelona sit 11 points clear of Madrid with only four league games remaining. The Catalan giants host their fiercest rivals at Camp Nou knowing that even a draw would be enough to mathematically secure the championship.

Article Title: ISL: Gurpreet Singh Sandhu shines as Bengaluru edge JFC in tight contest
Article Text:
ISL

On a night when India’s talismanic footballer Sunil Chhetri became the most-capped Indian Super League player with 195 appearances, it was his long-time teammate Gurpreet Singh Sandhu who turned back the clock with a goalkeeping masterclass as Bengaluru FC edged hosts Jamshedpur FC 1-0 at the JRD Tata Sports Complex on Saturday.Jamshedpur, looking to stay in contention for the title, went on the offensive from the outset but simply could not find a way past Gurpreet. Ryan Williams’ goal in the 38th minute eventually proved enough to hand Bengaluru the win and inflict Jamshedpur’s first home defeat of the season.With the victory, Bengaluru FC climbed to fourth place with 20 points from 12 matches, while Jamshedpur slipped to third with 21 points from the same number of games and are now almost out of the title race.Earlier, Jamshedpur FC began brightly and registered their first shot on goal in the 15th minute when Madih Talal set up Messi Bouli for a long-range effort that failed to trouble Gurpreet.He was again on the money a few minutes later when Rosenberg Gabriel delivered the ball from the right towards the penalty area in the hope that Mohammed Sanan would latch on to it, but the India goalkeeper dived forward to collect it at the second attempt.Undeterred, Jamshedpur continued to dictate terms and earned a free kick on the left flank after Bouli was fouled by Rahul Bheke. However, Pratik Chaudhari’s effort from Talal’s delivery was ruled offside.The match slowly turned on its head thereafter, with Williams going close on a couple of occasions before the hosts managed to keep him at bay. He, however, had the last laugh in the 38th minute when he struck with his right foot.It was a long ball from near the halfway line that was brought down neatly by Lalremtluanga Fanai, allowing Williams to take a couple of touches before slotting the ball into the bottom-left corner through the legs of Jamshedpur defenders. Albino Gomes got a hand to it, but not enough to keep it out.Despite conceding, the hosts refused to give up and continued to push for an equaliser, but luck was not on their side. After the change of ends, the pattern remained the same, with Gurpreet producing a brilliant right-handed save to deny Bouli from point-blank range.The contest later turned into a stop-start affair, but despite sustained pressure and strong home support, Jamshedpur slumped to only their second loss of the season.
Article Summary: Bengaluru FC beat Jamshedpur FC 1-0 at the JRD Tata Sports Complex. Ryan Williams' goal in the 38th minute proved enough to hand Bengaluru the win. Bengaluru FC climbed to fourth place with 20 points from 12 matches, while Jamsherpur slipped to third with 21 points from the same number of games.

Article Title: Barcelona Vs Real Madrid: 'El Clasico special this time because we can win La Liga': Frenkie de Jong Exclusive
Article Text:
Barcelona's Frenkie de Jong (AP Photo/Bernat Armangue)

Watch Exclusive: Aymeric Laporte previews Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona | La Liga Exclusive: Aymeric Laporte previews Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona | La Liga

(Watch El Clasico LIVE and exclusively on FanCode from 00.30 hrs on May 11 )

Frenkie de Jong flashed his pearly whites as he sat in the interview room, dressed in Barcelona’s training blue with bright yellow trims. It was an assured look of a player, aware that history is one match away.This Sunday night, Hansi Flick’s Barcelona can clinch the league crown against their eternal rivals, Real Madrid, in a Clasico that means much more than bragging rights. Such an occasion has never arisen in La Liga’s 97-year-old history.The grand episode is set to unfold at the refurbished Camp Nou, which will stage its first Clasico in more than 1,000 days. In the Oct Bernabeu meeting between the clubs, Madrid’s victory had opened a five-point gap at the top of the table. Now Barcelona lead by 11, needing only a draw to secure the championship with only 4 matches to play.“The approach is the same because we always prepare to win,” De Jong said. “But of course, the feeling is different. It’s El Clasico, and now it’s even more special because we can win La Liga.”The momentum has shifted sharply since those early months of the season. Madrid enter the weekend amid turbulence with coaching uncertainty, internal clashes, and indifferent form, while Barcelona are bouncing on belief.“There are moments in a season where a team grows,” De Jong said. “I think we are more reliable now than we were at the beginning. We’ve always had quality, but form, injuries and availability matter. Madrid has a great team, but maybe they are not in their best moment right now. We focus on ourselves.”In matches of this magnitude, the midfield may determine the outcome, and Barcelona’s lack of a defensive fulcrum in the nature of Sergio Busquets is a recurring point of discussion. Especially with exits in the semis and quarters of the Champions League in consecutive seasons, despite showing promise.De Jong dismissed the notion that Barcelona lack balance in the centre. “We have a great midfield,” he said. “Injuries always affect a team, but one of our strengths is depth and versatility in that area.”However, he acknowledged the lingering frustration in Europe. “The Champions League was disappointing because we thought we could go further,” he said. “But overall, we’ve had a good season. We’ve scored many goals, we have a lot of points in Liga, and winning the league requires consistency more than anything. Because of Europe, maybe the season hasn’t been great, but it has been good.”At only 28, De Jong has quietly become Barcelona’s longest-serving first-team player (318 matches) and the Dutchman with the most appearances in club history, extending a lineage deeply tied to the Netherlands and influential figures like Johan Cruyff.His own career has been interrupted at times by injury. Now he finds himself guiding a younger generation, particularly Lamine Yamal, whose rapid ascent has brought both acclaim and scrutiny off the field. A hamstrung Yamal will miss Sunday’s match, and this season has been undermined by concerns over his ongoing ‘pubalgia’ condition despite his starry performances.“I think he should continue exactly as he is,” De Jong said. “He should enjoy football the way he always has. If he keeps doing that, I believe he will have a great career, and that will also be beneficial for us.”Across the divide stands Kylian Mbappe, whose second season in Madrid has prompted waves of criticism from Los Blancos fans despite his high turnover of 41 goals from 41 matches.De Jong was measured in his assessment. “Mbappe is one of the best players in the world,” he said. “When he plays, Madrid are stronger. But football can be very reactionary. One result or action changes everything in people’s minds.”For the silent orchestrator, though, the game’s larger truth remains unchanged. “It’s not really about individuals,” he said. “Both teams have great players. What decides matches now is teamwork and hard work.”And if Barcelona complete the task against Real?“It’s not over yet,” De Jong said, smiling again. “But I hope Sunday will become my favourite moment of the season.”
Article Summary: Barcelona face Real Madrid in El Clasico at Camp Nou on Sunday. Barcelona lead La Liga by 11 points with just four matches to play. Frenkie de Jong says Barcelona have a great midfield. De Jong is Barcelona's longest-serving first- team player (318 matches)

Article Title: Real Madrid punish Aurelien Tchouameni and Federico Valverde after training-ground fight
Article Text:
Aurelien Tchouameni and Federico Valverde of Real Madrid look on during the LaLiga match between Real Madrid CF and Girona FC at Estadio Santiago Bernabeu on April 10, 2026 in Madrid, Spain. (Photo/Getty Images)

Poll Do you think Aurelien Tchouameni and Federico Valverde should have faced further sporting punishment? Yes, they should face more severe consequences No, the fine is sufficient

Real Madrid announced on Friday that Aurelien Tchouameni and Federico Valverde had each been fined 500,000 euros after a clash during training that left Valverde needing hospital treatment.The club said no sporting punishment would be given to the two players and added that the fine “thereby concludes the internal procedures” started after the incident.Valverde will miss Sunday’s Clasico against FC Barcelona because of the head injury he suffered during the altercation. The club said he could be out for up to two weeks.Tchouameni trained on Friday and could still play at Camp Nou this weekend.Madrid said both players “expressed their complete remorse for what happened and apologised to each other” during the club investigation."They extended their apologies to the club, their teammates, the coaching staff, and the fans, and both have made themselves available to Real Madrid to accept whatever sanction the club deems appropriate," the club statement said.Valverde was taken to a hospital near Madrid’s Valdebebas training ground by coach Alvaro Arbeloa, according to Spanish media reports, as quoted by news agency AFP. Reports said he needed stitches for a facial injury.Valverde later tried to reduce the seriousness of the incident."The strain of the competition and frustration caused the situation to escalate," Valverde wrote on social media."I accidentally hit a table during the argument, causing a small cut on my forehead that required a routine visit to the hospital," he said."At no point did my team-mate hit me, and I didn't hit him either."Reports said the two players argued during training on Wednesday and the issue continued on Thursday during and after the session.Spanish media also reported that Valverde refused to shake Tchouameni’s hand and later fouled him during training on Thursday. The reports added that the two then got involved in a fight in the dressing room, where the injury happened.Tensions have been high at Real Madrid as the club risks finishing a second straight season without a major trophy.Madrid are 11 points behind Barcelona in La Liga. Barcelona, coached by Hansi Flick, can secure another league title on Sunday if they avoid defeat.
Article Summary: Aurelien Tchouameni and Federico Valverde fined 500,000 euros by Real Madrid. The fine follows a clash during training that left Valerde needing hospital treatment. The club said no sporting punishment would be given to the two players.

Article Title: First win since 2005: India on verge of first AFC U-17 Women's Football Asian Cup knockout berth in 21 years
Article Text:
Photo credit: X/@IndianFootball

Watch EXCLUSIVE: Where did things go wrong for India in Women's Asia Cup? Aditi Chauhan decodes EXCLUSIVE: Where did things go wrong for India in Women's Asia Cup? Aditi Chauhan decodes

India kept alive their hopes of reaching the quarter-finals of the AFC Under-17 Women’s Asian Cup with a 4-0 win over Lebanon in their final Group B match at the Suzhou Taihu Football Sports Centre in China on Friday.Pritika Barman scored twice in the 6th and 85th minutes, while Alva Devi Senjam and Joya also scored for India.Pritika led the attack with two goals as India registered their first win in the tournament since 2005.The result strengthened India’s chances of reaching the quarter-finals as one of the two best third-placed teams. India are now close to qualifying for the knockout stage for the first time in 21 years.After the result, the Philippines would need to beat Chinese Taipei by 12 goals, while Chinese Taipei would need a 13-goal win.India made one change from their previous match, with Anushka Kumari replacing Pearl Fernandes, and started the game attacking from the beginning.Divyani Linda sent a long ball forward from right-back, which Pritika controlled before getting past Lebanon defender Joya Bou Assaf. Pritika then beat goalkeeper Marie Joe Chebly with a left-footed shot to give India the lead.India almost scored again soon after when Anushka got space inside the box, but Marie made the save.Pritika continued to trouble the Lebanon defence and nearly scored her second goal in the 16th minute, but the goalkeeper stopped her effort again.Redima Devi Chingkhamayum passed the ball to Alva at the edge of the box, and the forward got past Gianna Frangieh before scoring to give India a 2-0 lead at half-time.India continued attacking in the second half and kept Lebanon under pressure. The Young Tigresses controlled possession for long periods and created chances from the wings.Their third goal came through Joya, who received the ball on the left side, moved past two defenders and scored with a right-footed strike to make it 3-0.India completed the win when Pritika scored her second goal of the match. She ran into the penalty area from the right wing and finished past Marie to make it 4-0.
Article Summary: Pritika Barman scored twice in the 6th and 85th minutes, while Alva Devi Senjam and Joya also scored for India. India registered their first win in the tournament since 2005. The result strengthened India’s chances of reaching the quarter-finals as one of the two best third-placed teams.

Article Title: Little by little, Arsenal great Kim Little achieves big feat
Article Text:
Kim Little of Arsenal (Photo by Paul Harding/Getty Images)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Watch Arvid Lindblad interview: Playing cricket in Mumbai, Indian roots and the F1 journey Arvid Lindblad interview: Playing cricket in Mumbai, Indian roots and the F1 journey

“Leader, Legend, Little” – read the tifo that fans had hung over the Emirates stands as the Arsenal captain made her 400th club appearance in a Women’s Super League (WSL) match against Spurs last month.It was validation for Kim Little’s 18-year journey with the London club that culminated in her lifting the UEFA Women’s Champions League (UWCL) title last season in one of the most successful years for the Arsenal women’s team.“My journey started in that first spell in 2008, with a much smaller fan base than we do now,” Little said during a virtual media interaction from London. “And my career has spanned this incredible growth of the women’s game. The average attendance is increasing every year and so are those season ticket holders.”While Arsenal handed Manchester City the WSL title on Wednesday with a draw against Brighton, the Gunners are sure to finish in the top four of WSL along with a last-four stint in UWCL.Little was imperious in last season’s UWCL final, holding her own against a stellar Barcelona midfield. Hence, there could be no better player to opine on the way forward for Indian women’s football. “The one thing will be to not mimic but connect with the broader women’s game across the globe. It’s useful to connect with countries like the UK, France, Germany, make connections and networks,” said Little.(FANS CAN WATCH WSL EXCLUSIVELY ON FANCODE)
Article Summary: Arsenal captain Kim Little won the UEFA Women’s Champions League (UWCL) title last season. Arsenal handed Manchester City the WSL title on Wednesday with a draw against Brighton. “My journey started in that first spell in 2008, with a much smaller fan base than we do now,” said Little.

Article Title: Celebrations turn violent: Nearly 130 arrested in Paris after PSG reach Champions League final
Article Text:
Bayern's Dayot Upamecano, right, challenges PSG's Khvicha Kvaratskhelia during the Champions League semifinal second leg soccer match between Bayern Munich and Paris Saint Germain in Munich, Germany, Wednesday, May 6, 2026. (AP Photo)

Nearly 130 people were arrested around Paris overnight after clashes broke out between fans and police following Paris Saint-Germain reaching the Champions League final, French interior minister Laurent Nuñez said on Thursday.127 people were arrested in the Paris metropolitan area, including 107 in Paris, Nuñez said while speaking to Europe 1 radio, as quoted by news agency AP. PSG had beaten Bayern Munich to reach their second straight Champions League final and third since 2020.He said 11 people were injured during the unrest, including one person who suffered a serious injury after being hit by a mortar. Twenty-three police officers also suffered minor injuries.The clashes happened outside PSG’s Parc des Princes stadium and on the Champs-Élysées. Police moved in to disperse groups and stop rioters from blocking the Paris ring road.“I condemn this strongly, there are always hundreds of individuals responsible for these excesses during these festivities who look to clash with law enforcement," Nuñez said.“I would like to thank the police prefect and all of his teams who systematically intervened according to my instructions, and those of my predecessors.”Nuñez also praised police for stopping damage to property and possible looting of shops.He said security arrangements would be strengthened for the Champions League final against Arsenal on May 30 in Budapest, Hungary.France has seen several such incidents in recent years.When PSG won the Champions League last year, more than 500 people were arrested across France. During those celebrations, a man in his 20s died in Paris after his scooter was hit by a car.Violence also continued the following day.In 2020, after PSG lost the Champions League final to Bayern, Paris police arrested 148 people following clashes between fans and officers. Cars and shop windows were damaged during the unrest.In 2013, when PSG won the French league title for the first time in 19 years, celebrations were interrupted after fans fought with riot police for several hours. Thirty people were injured.
Article Summary: 127 people were arrested in the Paris metropolitan area, including 107 in Paris. 11 people were injured during the unrest, including one person who suffered a serious injury after being hit by a mortar. PSG had beaten Bayern Munich to reach their second straight Champions League final and third since 2020.

Article Title: Fred Johnson Controversy: “Kick out his eight-month pregnant...”: Ex-girlfriend’s viral TikTok claims put Eagles lineman Fred Johnson at the center of an online debate
Article Text:
Ex-girlfriend’s viral TikTok claims put Eagles lineman Fred Johnson at the center of the online debate(Getty)

Alyssa Okada’s viral TikTok videos spark backlash around Eagles tackle Fred Johnson

Philadelphia Eagles offensive tackle Fred Johnson landed in the middle of a social media storm this week after his ex-girlfriend, Alyssa Okada, shared emotional TikTok videos about their breakup. The videos started causing a buzz after Okada claimed she was eight months pregnant when the relationship ended.While Johnson did not directly address the allegations, the situation quickly drew attention across NFL circles and social media platforms because of the timing and details in Okada’s posts.Fred Johnson's ex-girlfriend, Alyssa Okada, first posted a TikTok video on Friday while sitting in her car, with suitcases visible in the back. Without directly naming Johnson at first, she described a “hypothetical” situation that immediately caught fans’ attention online.In the viral video, she said: “Hypothetically, if a man were to kick out his eight-month pregnant girlfriend and unborn daughter and then be on Hinge the very next day looking for women to have fun with.”She continued by questioning the character of a man who would allegedly do that, adding: “You would probably not think that that type of man has integrity or morals or any form of decency.”The post spread quickly across TikTok, X, and NFL fan pages. Soon after, fans connected the comments to Johnson because Okada had regularly posted photos and videos with the Eagles lineman throughout the 2025 season. Back in Jan. 2026, the couple also revealed they were expecting a baby girl.Things became more emotional when Okada uploaded another TikTok addressing criticism she received online after the first video went viral. In that clip, she pushed back against people blaming women for failed relationships. “No woman ever knowingly goes into a situation thinking this person is going to hurt me,” she said in the TikTok posted Sunday.The reaction online stayed divided. Some fans supported Okada for speaking publicly, while others questioned why private issues reached social media. Meanwhile, Fred Johnson posted several cryptic messages on Instagram Stories over the weekend. One of the posts read: “The hardest flex isn’t revenge. It’s watching someone who tried to destroy you realize you survived without ever mentioning their name.”As of now, Philadelphia Eagles star Fred Johnson has not released any official public statement directly responding to the allegations.
Article Summary: Philadelphia Eagles offensive tackle Fred Johnson landed in the middle of a social media storm this week. His ex-girlfriend, Alyssa Okada, shared emotional TikTok videos about their breakup. The videos started causing a buzz after Okada claimed she was eight months pregnant.

Article Title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce turn George Karlaftis’ dreamy Greek wedding into social media’s hottest celebrity moment
Article Text:
Taylor Swift And Travis Kelce (Getty Images)

Why did Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift’s Greece wedding appearance attract so much attention?



How did Taylor Swift reportedly behave during George Karlaftis’ wedding celebration?



Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift spent most of the NFL offseason away from the spotlight, but their latest appearance quickly became one of the weekend’s biggest celebrity stories. The couple traveled to Greece for Kansas City Chiefs defensive end George Karlaftis and Kaia Harris’ wedding celebration in Athens, where guests described a relaxed, tightly private atmosphere that allowed everyone to celebrate without cameras following every moment. Reports from the event painted a different picture of Swift than the carefully managed public image fans usually see, with attendees focusing less on celebrity and more on how naturally she blended into the celebration alongside Kelce.Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift arrived in Greece after a short stay in London, where they attended a revival of Romeo and Juliet at the Harold Pinter Theatre before being spotted at Gordon Ramsay’s restaurant Lucky Cat the following evening. Their stop in Athens, however, generated far more attention once details from the wedding started circulating online.Karlaftis and Harris hosted their wedding at One&Only Aesthesis, a luxury coastal resort in Glyfada.The three-day celebration reportedly included around 220 guests, many with connections to the Chiefs and Purdue University. But unlike most celebrity-heavy events, this one stayed remarkably controlled.According to Huffington Post Greece, guests surrendered their phones before entering the festivities. “Guests kept their phones turned off and had even handed them over for safekeeping. Publicity stayed outside the door.”That decision shaped the entire atmosphere of the weekend. Instead of constant social media clips and staged moments, attendees described an unusually relaxed celebration where Kelce and Swift were simply part of the crowd. Reports also said the couple stayed aboard a private yacht near the venue after arriving by private jet.The wedding itself carried strong personal meaning for Karlaftis, who was born in Greece before moving to the United States. The celebration reportedly leaned heavily into Greek traditions and family customs rather than celebrity spectacle.Most of the attention after the wedding centered on Swift’s behavior during the reception. Guests told Greek media that she spent much of the night dancing alongside Kelce and other attendees rather than remaining separated from the crowd.“Swift, according to the same sources, danced all night long.”The report added that many guests were surprised by how approachable she appeared throughout the celebration.“All the guests were impressed by her simplicity. Kind and down-to-earth.”According to those accounts, Swift greeted guests personally, stood in line at the buffet herself and joined traditional Greek dancing after Karlaftis performed a hasaposeriviko during the party. Guests reportedly followed him onto the dance floor, including Swift and Kelce.For a couple constantly surrounded by security and global attention, the wedding offered something unusual: a rare private setting where they could celebrate without every moment turning into a headline in real time. Ironically, that privacy may be exactly what made the stories from Athens spread so quickly afterward.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift attended George Karlaftis and Kaia Harris’ wedding in Athens. Reports from the event painted a different picture of Swift than the carefully managed public image fans usually see. Guests described a relaxed, tightly private atmosphere that allowed everyone to celebrate without cameras.

Article Title: Nfl Trade Rumors: NFL Trade Rumors: Los Angeles Chargers and Chicago Bears linked to former All-Pro wide receiver
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Los Angeles Chargers and Chicago Bears linked to former All-Pro wide receiver(Getty)

NFL Trade Rumors: Los Angeles Chargers and Chicago Bears reportedly exploring a possible Deebo Samuel fit



Deebo Samuel still waits for his next team, but the latest NFL trade rumors suggest his market may finally be heating up. The Los Angeles Chargers and Chicago Bears have both emerged as possible landing spots after Samuel quietly rebuilt some value during his 2025 season with the Washington Commanders.For a player who once terrified defenses every Sunday, the buzz around Samuel slowed down fast over the last two years. Yet teams around the league still see something useful in his game. He may not look exactly like the explosive star from San Francisco anymore, but he remains one of the few receivers who can line up almost anywhere and change an offense’s rhythm.Deebo Samuel entered 2025 carrying plenty of doubts after his split from the San Francisco 49ers. Questions around his speed, durability, and long-term value followed him into Washington. Instead of disappearing, though, he responded with a respectable season on a struggling offense.The veteran wide receiver finished with 72 receptions, 727 receiving yards, and five touchdowns across 16 games. Those numbers become more impressive when considering rookie quarterback Jayden Daniels missed time through injury during the season.Now, analysts believe Samuel could help a contender again. In an article published by Bleacher Report writer Paul Kasabian, both the Los Angeles Chargers and Chicago Bears were linked to the former All-Pro. Kasabian especially highlighted Samuel’s previous success under the current Chargers offensive coordinator, Mike McDaniel, when both worked together in San Francisco.“Deebo Samuel’s best season was with the 2021 San Francisco 49ers, whose offense was led by coordinator Mike McDaniel,” Kasabian wrote in his Bleacher Report column. “McDaniel is now the Los Angeles Chargers offensive coordinator and could have an idea or two on how to use him.”The LA Chargers connection feels natural. Justin Herbert still needs another dependable playmaker outside of Ladd McConkey, especially after Quentin Johnston struggled to develop into a true No. 1 option. Samuel could immediately help Los Angeles with his run-after-catch ability and physical style. Even if his huge 2021 numbers never return, the Chargers do not need him to carry the offense alone.The Chicago Bears fit creates more debate. Caleb Williams already has several young weapons, including Rome Odunze, Luther Burden, and tight end Colston Loveland. Still, head coach Ben Johnson values offensive creativity, and Samuel gives coordinators the flexibility few receivers provide.That versatility matters. Deebo Samuel can still line up in the slot, take handoffs, handle screens, and create mismatches against smaller defenders. For playoff teams searching for another offensive spark, that skill set still holds value.Right now, no move appears imminent. But after weeks of silence, Deebo Samuel once again looks connected to teams with serious postseason expectations.
Article Summary: The Los Angeles Chargers and Chicago Bears have both emerged as possible landing spots for Deebo Samuel. Samuel quietly rebuilt some value during his 2025 season with the Washington Commanders. The veteran wide receiver finished with 72 receptions, 727 receiving yards, and five touchdowns across 16 games.

Article Title: Fernando Mendoza is a huge Donald Trump fan? President reveals surprising phone call about the QB's White House absence
Article Text:
Fernando Mendoza and President Donald Trump (Getty Images)

Why did Donald Trump bring up Fernando Mendoza during the White House ceremony?



Indiana coach Curt Cignetti responded with a laugh before confirming the reason was tied to football obligations.



Is Fernando Mendoza already fighting for the Raiders’ starting quarterback job?



The Indiana football team celebrated its College Football Playoff championship at the White House on Monday, but one absence quickly became part of the conversation. Quarterback Fernando Mendoza, the No. 1 overall pick in the 2026 NFL Draft, stayed in Las Vegas instead of joining his former teammates in Washington. President Donald Trump addressed the situation directly during the ceremony, revealing that Mendoza personally called to explain why he could not attend while continuing offseason work with the Las Vegas Raiders.Fernando Mendoza’s absence stood out because he was the face of Indiana’s championship season. After transferring from University of California, Berkeley, he became one of college football’s biggest breakout stars before eventually landing with the Raiders as the top pick in April’s draft.During the White House event, Trump made it clear he expected Mendoza to attend before learning the quarterback had chosen to remain with his NFL team.“Now, the reason he’s not here, he was so nice, he called,” Trump said, “because actually, JD (Vance), he’s a big fan of ours. You wouldn’t believe it because he didn’t show up. I’m not happy but that’s OK. The reason he didn’t is because he’s at spring training, right?”The timing mattered. Raiders voluntary offseason workouts began in early April, and Mendoza had already hinted earlier this month that missing practice as a rookie would send the wrong message inside the building.While White House visits often become politically charged moments for athletes, Mendoza’s public comments have consistently focused on football, preparation, and earning trust early in his NFL career.Even after being selected first overall, Mendoza is not walking into a guaranteed starting role. The Raiders signed veteran quarterback Kirk Cousins in free agency, and the organization has openly suggested patience with its rookie passer.Mendoza appears to understand that reality. He previously explained why skipping workouts never felt like a realistic option.“I’m on the bottom of the totem pole here. I’ve got to prove myself,” Mendoza told the media previously. “I can’t miss practice. I don’t have the calendar, but as a rookie, I don’t think that’s a good look. I want to try to best serve my teammates, and I don’t know if that’d be accomplishing that goal.”That mindset has already drawn attention around the league. Former NFL receiver Nate Burleson believes Cousins still holds the advantage entering training camp.“I think Kirk’s going to have to fumble that opportunity away,” Burleson told Sports Illustrated. “[Mendoza is] not going to beat out Kirk Cousins right now. Kirk is still a veteran quarterback, and if you look at the money they paid him, he’s going there to play quarterback. You don’t pay a guy that much just to teach a young buck how to throw the ball.”For Mendoza, skipping a White House celebration may have disappointed some Indiana fans. Inside the Raiders facility, though, the decision likely reinforced the image he wants to establish before his first NFL season even begins.
Article Summary: Fernando Mendoza stayed in Las Vegas instead of joining his former teammates in Washington. President Donald Trump addressed the situation directly during the ceremony. The Raiders signed veteran quarterback Kirk Cousins in free agency, and the organization has openly suggested patience with its rookie passer.

Article Title: Dianna Russini kisses husband Kevin Goldschmidt in emotional Mother’s Day appearance following weeks of Mike Vrabel controversy
Article Text:
Dianna Russini (Getty Images)

Dianna Russini and Kevin Goldschmidt photographed together now?



Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, were seen kissing on Mother’s Day. (Page Six)

How did the Mike Vrabel controversy become national sports news?



What impact has the scandal had on Russini and Vrabel professionally?



Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, were seen kissing on Mother’s Day which was their first public appearance since her scandal with Patriots coach Mike Vrabel. She was seen holding one of their two young sons in her arms. It's the clearest sign yet that the couple is choosing to face this together rather than fall apart quietly. While neither Russini nor Vrabel has publicly addressed the latest round of reports, the sighting offered a different image than the one dominating sports gossip headlines since March.The photos, first published by Page Six, showed Dianna Russini holding one of the couple’s two sons while leaning in to kiss Kevin Goldschmidt outside their home. Goldschmidt was also seen wearing his wedding ring during the moment, a detail that quickly fueled online discussion about the couple’s current relationship status.People close to the family suggested the public appearance was not staged or unusual despite the media attention surrounding Russini in recent weeks.“People in the community have said they’ve been very resilient as a family,” a source told the outlet.“They haven’t been in hiding.”That detail matters because much of the public conversation around Russini lately has centered on speculation, silence and damage control. The Mother’s Day sighting instead projected stability, or at least an effort to maintain it.The controversy began after Russini and Vrabel were photographed together during a trip to an adults-only resort in Arizona earlier this year. Images from the trip showed the pair holding hands, dancing and spending time poolside together.Both denied affair allegations and maintained they were traveling with friends who were not visible in the published photographs. Still, the story gained momentum as additional eyewitness accounts challenged that explanation.The situation escalated further when older photos allegedly showing Russini and Vrabel together at a New York bar in 2020 surfaced online. According to reports, an insider claimed the two “were kissing” and “all over each other.”Last week, another round of photos reportedly showed the pair on a private boat trip in Tennessee in 2021. Russini was visibly pregnant at the time, adding another layer to the public reaction surrounding the story.Russini stepped away from her role as Senior NFL Insider at The Athletic following the controversy, though neither side has publicly gone into detail about the decision.Vrabel, meanwhile, remains head coach of the New England Patriots. He also announced he would skip Day 3 of the 2026 NFL Draft to “seek counseling,” a move that drew significant attention across NFL circles.The Patriots later released a statement backing their coach.“The New England Patriots fully support Mike Vrabel’s decision to prioritize his family first, as well as his own well-being. Mike has been open with us about his commitment to being the best version of himself for his family, this team and our fans, and we respect the steps he is taking to follow through on that commitment.”For now, neither Russini nor Vrabel appears eager to continue the public conversation. But with new images continuing to surface, the story remains difficult for either side to fully escape.
Article Summary: Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, were seen kissing on Mother’s Day. It was their first public appearance since her scandal with Patriots coach Mike Vrabel. The sighting offered a different image than the one dominating sports gossip headlines since March.

Article Title: Tom Brady turns Kevin Hart’s Netflix roast upside down with bold joke involving comedian’s wife and brutal comeback
Article Text:
Kevin Hart’s wife and Tom Brady (Getty Images)

Why did Tom Brady target Kevin Hart’s wife during the Netflix roast?

Did Tom Brady steal the spotlight from Kevin Hart?

Tom Brady did not need much time to turn Netflix’s Roast of Kevin Hart into his own show. The seven-time Super Bowl champion arrived unannounced at Los Angeles’ Kia Forum on Sunday night and immediately shifted the mood inside the arena. Brady mixed personal shots, old roast revenge, and a few uncomfortable jokes aimed at Kevin Hart’s wife, Eniko Hart, during a brief but sharp appearance that quickly spread across social media. What started as another celebrity roast became a reminder that Brady still knows how to command attention, even away from football.Tom Brady’s appearance carried a clear sense of unfinished business from 2024, when Hart hosted The Roast of Tom Brady and repeatedly joked about the quarterback’s family and personal life. Brady came prepared for payback.He opened with jokes about Hart’s height, handing him a tiny Knicks jersey and mocking him from the moment he stepped onstage. Brady said, “That’s newborn size. It fits you.”The former Patriots quarterback kept escalating from there. He mocked Hart’s movie career, took aim at the roast lineup, and revisited Hart’s past controversy involving allegations of infidelity.“I’m a busy man, but I do have a few words for you before I return to my affairs in Las Vegas.Oh, wait, I’m talking about affairs in Las Vegas. Was that off? Not supposed to talk about affairs in Vegas? I think I broke another rule,” Brady said.The loudest reaction came moments later when Brady turned his attention toward Eniko Hart sitting in the audience.“Kevin, you took a lot of shots at my family in the roast. But I’m too classy to go after your beautiful wife. Or am I?”Then came the line that instantly exploded online.“What’s up, girl?”Hart immediately shouted back, “Cut it out!” as the crowd erupted.For many watching, he absolutely did. Brady’s segment lasted only a few minutes, but it quickly became the defining moment of the night. His delivery felt far more relaxed than it did during his own roast two years ago. There was no hesitation this time. He looked comfortable leaning into the chaos.Part of the reaction came from surprise. Brady has spent most of his post-retirement years building a polished television image ahead of his FOX broadcasting role in 2026. Sunday night showed a different side. Less guarded. More willing to play the villain.That balance is what made the appearance work. The jokes crossed lines at times, but Brady never appeared rattled by the crowd or the tension inside the room. He controlled the pace from start to finish before leaving with one last shot.“Payback’s a b---- and so are you, Kevin Hart.”It was brief, messy, and exactly the kind of viral moment Netflix hoped would dominate Monday’s conversation.
Article Summary: Tom Brady's appearance carried a clear sense of unfinished business from 2024. Brady came prepared for payback. He opened with jokes about Hart’s height, handing him a tiny Knicks jersey. The former Patriots quarterback has spent most of his post-retirement years building a polished television image.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini photographed closely at Super Bowl 2022 party as old image suddenly resurfaces online
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s resurfaced Super Bowl party photo (Getty Images)

Why are the new Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini photos drawing so much attention?

What does the timeline of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s interactions reveal?

Fresh photos from a Super Bowl LVI party have added another layer to the ongoing scrutiny surrounding Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini. The images, published by TMZ Sports, show Russini leaning into Vrabel with her arm wrapped around his back during an NFL Honors gathering in Los Angeles in February 2022. At the time, few around them appeared to notice anything unusual. Four years later, with earlier photos and videos already circulating online, the latest images have intensified attention on a relationship that has now become one of the NFL world’s most discussed off-field stories.The newly surfaced images matter less because of what they show and more because of where they fit in the timeline. Vrabel had just won NFL Coach of the Year after leading the Tennessee Titans to the AFC’s top seed. Russini was one of ESPN’s most visible NFL insiders and had spent years covering league executives, coaches and players across the country.According to TMZ Sports, “The two were spotted hugging at a VIP party at The Forum in Los Angeles before Super Bowl LVI … with Russini leaning in close to talk to the head coach.”The report added, “We’re told this gathering was for a NFL Honors party … with plenty of football people present.Basically, the type of bash many of Vrabel and Russini’s colleagues would surely attend.”On their own, the photos likely would not have generated major headlines. But this is no longer an isolated moment. Reports and leaked images tied to the pair now stretch back several years, covering different cities, events and stages of their personal lives.That growing timeline is what has changed public perception.The discussion surrounding the pair has shifted from speculation about a single encounter to questions about consistency and professional boundaries. Photos from 2020 first showed the two together in New York. Later reports detailed private outings, including a boat trip and casino appearances, before the latest Super Bowl party images resurfaced this week.Both also remained deeply connected to NFL circles throughout that period. Russini continued covering league insiders and front offices, while Vrabel coached the Titans before eventually joining the Patriots.Neither has publicly addressed the individual incidents beyond earlier denials of wrongdoing. Vrabel has described the matter as personal and private while also revealing he is seeking counseling. Russini resigned from her position at The Athletic in April following an internal review tied to earlier reports.What continues fueling discussion is the sheer number of sightings tied together over time. In the NFL media ecosystem, where access and relationships already sit under constant scrutiny, every newly released image now carries more weight than the last.
Article Summary: New photos show Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini hugging at a party in 2022. The images have intensified attention on a relationship that has become one of the NFL world’s most discussed off-field stories. The newly surfaced images matter less because of what they show and more because of where they fit in the timeline.

Article Title: "He is sleeping with other media": Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy takes darker turn after media bias accusations
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel’s alleged affair controversy involving NFL reporter Dianna Russini has intensified after an anonymous former NFL scout accused media figures of protecting the Patriots coach from harsher public backlash. The viral claims surfaced after comparisons were made between Vrabel’s situation and former Michigan coach Sherrone Moore’s scandal. As more photos and videos involving Vrabel and Russini continue appearing online, debate over media double standards and accountability in sports coverage keeps growing across NFL circles and social media.

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini scandal sparks media bias debate



Mike Vrabel breaks silence as more photos continue surfacing

Mike Vrabel’s controversy involving NFL reporter Dianna Russini has entered another explosive phase after fresh accusations surfaced online questioning why the Patriots coach has avoided the level of public backlash faced by former Michigan coach Sherrone Moore. What started as a scandal built around leaked photos and private outings has now turned into a larger debate about media influence, public accountability and how sports controversies are covered differently depending on who is involved.The latest claims emerged after an anonymous social media account identifying itself as a former NFL scout accused media figures and league insiders of protecting Vrabel from harsher criticism. The comments quickly spread across NFL circles, especially as more old images and videos involving Vrabel and Russini continue resurfacing online. While many fans remain divided over the scandal itself, the comparison to Moore’s case has created an even more heated discussion.The online uproar intensified after former NFL player Breiden Fehoko publicly questioned why Vrabel was not receiving the same level of criticism as Moore.Shortly afterward, an account known as “Angry Scout Vet” responded with a blunt accusation.“He (Mike Vrabel) is sleeping with other media and a lot of media is doing this,” the account wrote. “Keep an eye on those who ignore it."The post then referenced several NFL figures and media personalities without providing evidence, claiming “teams and media want this to go away desperately.”The comments immediately triggered debate online. Some fans agreed the Vrabel story had been handled carefully by major outlets, while others argued the comparison to Moore’s case was deeply misleading. Community Notes on X quickly highlighted that Moore’s situation involved criminal allegations, including home invasion and stalking charges tied to a former staff member.By contrast, Vrabel’s situation, while controversial, has not involved criminal accusations or workplace misconduct allegations tied directly to his organisation.Pressure surrounding Vrabel increased after multiple images and videos involving Russini resurfaced over recent weeks. One widely discussed video showed the pair boarding a private boat together while Vrabel coached the Tennessee Titans. Another older photo from Super Bowl LVI weekend showed Russini leaning closely toward the Patriots coach at a VIP event.Amid growing attention, Vrabel addressed the situation publicly during a press conference in April. “I take accountability for my actions and the actions that caused a distraction to the people that I care most about -- my family, this football team, the organization, and our fans,” he said.Meanwhile, Russini resigned from her position at The Athletic following an internal review. Despite nonstop speculation, the Patriots have continued backing Vrabel publicly, at least for now.Still, with new leaks appearing almost weekly and social media refusing to let the story fade, the controversy surrounding Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini shows no signs of slowing down.
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel’s controversy involving NFL reporter Dianna Russini has entered another explosive phase after fresh accusations surfaced online. An anonymous former NFL scout accused media figures of protecting the Patriots coach from harsher public backlash. The claims surfaced after comparisons were made between the situation and that of former Michigan coach Sherrone Moore. The comments quickly spread across NFL circles, especially as more old images and videos involving V rabel and Russini continue resurfacing.

Article Text:
Mike Vrabel’s ongoing controversy involving NFL reporter Dianna Russini took another dramatic turn after a former NFL player defended the Patriots coach while openly admitting to his own past infidelity. Despite growing public scrutiny and nonstop headlines surrounding the alleged affair, reports suggest the Patriots organisation continues to support Vrabel as he prepares for the upcoming NFL season.

Asante Samuel’s Mike Vrabel defence shocks NFL fans

Mike Vrabel controversy continues despite Patriots support

Mike Vrabel’s alleged relationship with NFL reporter Dianna Russini continues to dominate football headlines, but the controversy took an even stranger turn after former Patriots teammate Asante Samuel publicly defended the coach while also confessing to his own history of cheating. What started as a scandal tied to leaked photos and rumoured secret meetings has now become a wider conversation about loyalty, accountability and how public figures handle personal fallout in the social media era.The New England Patriots have stayed publicly silent while speculation around Vrabel’s future keeps growing. Yet Samuel’s attempt to support the coach may have created even more attention than the original defence itself. His comments quickly exploded online, with many fans stunned that the former All-Pro cornerback used his own extramarital past to argue in Vrabel’s favour.The controversy surrounding Vrabel intensified after several photos surfaced online allegedly showing the Patriots head coach in close moments with Russini over the years. Public scrutiny grew further when reports linked the pair to private outings, including a widely discussed boat trip that reignited speculation about how long the relationship may have existed.Despite the backlash, Samuel came forward to defend his former teammate on social media. He wrote, “Vrabel is a faithful man. Whatever happened in the past is the past; as of today, he is a faithful man. Move on.”The statement alone drew mixed reactions, but Samuel then stunned followers with another deeply personal confession that instantly went viral. In the same discussion, he admitted:“When I had a wife and side chick. The side piece got in her feelings, called the wife, told her everything. Got that call at work, we need to talk. Scary!!!!!! Me: She lying baby…”The internet reacted immediately. Some users mocked the post for being reckless, while others questioned whether Samuel’s comments actually helped Vrabel at all.Even with the mounting headlines, reports suggest the Patriots organisation is not currently planning major changes involving Vrabel. After leading New England to a strong 2025 season and a Super Bowl appearance, the coach still reportedly has support within the Kraft family and inside the building.Still, the scandal has become a constant distraction around the franchise. Betting chatter and sports talk debates continue to swirl as critics question whether the situation could eventually affect the team’s image or locker-room stability.For now, Vrabel remains in charge. But every new comment, leaked detail and public defence seems to add another layer to a controversy that refuses to disappear. Samuel’s remarks may have been intended as support, yet for many NFL fans, they only added more fuel to an already explosive story.
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel’s alleged relationship with NFL reporter Dianna Russini continues to dominate football headlines. Former Patriots teammate Asante Samuel publicly defended the coach while also confessing to his own history of cheating. Article Title: "Money will NEVER buy class": Brittany Mahomes slammed as fans say Patrick Mahomes’ fame “changed her completely”
Article Text:
Brittany Mahomes is facing fresh online backlash after a recent social media post triggered accusations of entitlement and arrogance from critics. Brittany Mahomes slammed after rainy slippers complaint goes viral

Brittany Mahomes’ past controversies continue to follow her

Brittany Mahomes is once again at the centre of an internet storm, and this time, it all started with a pair of rain-soaked slippers. A short Instagram clip shared by Patrick Mahomes ’ wife has triggered a fresh wave of criticism online, with reddit users accusing her of being out of touch and overly dramatic. What may have seemed like a harmless complaint quickly snowballed into another viral debate about celebrity entitlement and Brittany’s polarising public image.The backlash spread fast across Reddit, where critics dissected the post and revived older controversies tied to the Kansas City Chiefs quarterback’s wife. While some fans argued the criticism has become excessive, others insisted Brittany Mahomes continues to create these moments herself through social media behaviour that many view as tone-deaf. The conversation has now reignited a larger debate about why she remains one of the NFL world’s most criticised celebrity spouses.The latest controversy began when Brittany posted a video showing herself walking through the rain wearing slippers. Alongside the clip, she wrote: “Now I gotta get new slippers dude.” That single sentence was enough to set off thousands of reactions online.One Reddit user reposted the clip with the caption: “She never stops complaining, does she? Money will NEVER buy class.” The criticism only intensified from there. Another commenter wrote, “Wow….The absolute entitlement. How many folks out there are working day in and day out in crummy boots and shoes that don’t have the means to replace them when they get wet!!!”Others questioned why the situation became a public complaint at all.One user pointed out, “What does she mean “Now I gotta get new slippers”? She’s the one that didn’t check the weather. She made the choice to walk outside with slippers.”The discussion quickly turned from wet footwear to Brittany’s broader reputation online. For critics, the video fit into a long-running pattern they believe reflects privilege and a lack of self-awareness.As the backlash grew, older social media moments involving Brittany resurfaced once again. One frequently mentioned example came from January 2025, when she defended Patrick Mahomes during an injury-filled NFL season with an Instagram Story that read: “Thank you for all your concerns with 15 this season. See y’all in New Orleans. His wife.”That post divided football fans. Some saw loyalty. Others saw arrogance. One Reddit critic responded harshly, writing, “The way she acts like she coached his team to get where they are, b—- sit down and STFU.”The internet also revived memories of Brittany spraying champagne on fans during a previous Chiefs celebration. Critics still cite that incident as the moment many turned against her publicly.Despite the nonstop scrutiny, Brittany Mahomes continues to maintain a strong presence online. Whether fans see confidence or entitlement often depends on where they already stand. Either way, every post she shares now seems to spark another heated debate.
Article Summary: Brittany Mahomes is facing fresh online backlash after a recent social media post triggered accusations of entitlement and arrogance from critics. Reddit users quickly revived past controversies involving Patrick Mahomes’ wife. The debate has once again highlighted her divisive reputation among NFL fans and social media users.

Article Text:
